data.title: WEIZE Kids Bike, 14 16 20 Inch Children Bicycle for Boys & Girls Youth Ages 4-12 Years Old, Rider Height 41-62 Inch, Adjustab

features: Size Guide - - 20 inch bike for 6-12 years (48"-62") boys & girls. Note: Measure kid’s INSEAM and compare with SADDLE HEIGHT to check if the rider can touch the ground.
PERFECT FOR BEGINNERS - - Our bicycle are engineered specifically for a kid's proportions
and lightweight frame create an easier ride and control.

Durable Wheels & Sturdy Frame - -Made of premium high carbon Steel to survive the bumps of learning. Anti-slip tires and detachable training wheels ensure steadiness and are helpful for beginners to practice balance.
SMOOTH RIDING - - Wide 2.125" tires with superior grip and bump absorption. This kids bicycle cruises smoothly on sidewalks
and light trails for endless fun.
EASY TO INSTALL - - The children bike comes with 85% Pre-assembled body and the basic assembly tools.You can watch the assembly video on our page first before splicing bicycles.
